discipline.input: recorded TradingAgents scorecards from orchestrator db
discipline.execution: first 1h bar strictly after scorecard.created_at, then predeclared horizon
discipline.costs: fee, slippage, and short funding when configured
discipline.statistics: one-sided positive sign test, bootstrap mean CI, BH-FDR for bucket and analyst groups
discipline.minimum_samples: overall min N plus separate bucket/analyst min N gates
discipline.safety: read-only; no LLM calls, live trading, orders, wallet, or account path
